full_text: HUL to Acquire Minimalist Skincare Brand in Major D2C Deal. Hindustan Unilever is set to acquire a controlling stake in Minimalist, the popular D2C skincare label, for nearly ₹3,000 crore. The acquisition underlines HUL's renewed focus on science-backed beauty and skincare products for urban consumers.
